'''Phrusaani''' was a [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] who operated the [[Docking Bay (cantina)|Docking Bay]] bar on [[the Life]] Level on [[Vergesso Base]]. 

A fan of [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Musician/Legends|musicians]], he provided [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes|Modal Nodes]] [[hologram/Legends|holos]] in his [[cantina/Legends|cantina]]. He tried to stay out of the business of his customers and the deals that took place in the booths of his place.

{{Char-stub}}
